title: Property Consultant - Lodha Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Lodha Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
